agents.name: First legal option
agents.description: Uses the first legal CABT selection whenever the local engine controls the opponent.

agents.name: Official random sample (Mega Abomasnow)
agents.description: Kaggle sample-submission policy: chooses a random legal option. Rule-based — auto-selects its Mega Abomasnow ex deck.

agents.name: Rule-based Mega Lucario ex
agents.description: Kaggle notebook sample: rule-based Mega Lucario ex that pivots between Lucario, Hariyama, and Solrock. Auto-selects its deck.

agents.name: Rule-based Dragapult ex
agents.description: Kaggle notebook sample: rule-based Dragapult ex focused on early setup and Phantom Dive pressure. Auto-selects its deck.
